highlights: Bridge Intercept lands as a strong act-turning sequence.
Rowan and Nila have memorable tactical chemistry.
The public fallout thread wants one more aftermath scene.

feedback.title: Chapter 1 pacing
feedback.text: The introduction is strong, but the market transition wants one more beat of emotional processing.

feedback.title: Cipher setup
feedback.text: The archive reconstruction sequence is compelling, but Nila should own more of the deciphering setup earlier.

feedback.title: Rowan voice
feedback.text: Rowan consistently lands with a dry tactical humor that helps the investigation feel sharp.
